conventions.series: cb5m.json buffered open-to-open: r[i]=(o[i+1]-o[i])/o[i]; up[i]=o[i+1]>=o[i] (tie->Up); 18,045 contiguous intervals 2026-05-11 11:55 -> 2026-07-13 03:35 UTC
conventions.fade_trade: trigger |r[i-1]|>=12bps, buy opposite side, fill p=0.51, EV/share = q - 0.527493 (frozen model)
conventions.split: TRAIN t0 < 2026-06-26 00:00 UTC (13,105 ivls) / TEST >= (4,940 ivls); FRESH = t0 >= 2026-07-10 11:55 UTC (data no prior round saw; gate frozen 2026-07-10)

multiplicity.A1: 2 runs tests + 24 autocorr lags + 12 move-buckets + 4 direction cells = 42
multiplicity.A2: 12 tercile cells + 2 hi-vs-rest contrasts + 9 ledger cells = 23
multiplicity.note: headline claims are flagged with their within-family K below

headline_findings.claim: In the 2.65 days AFTER the flagship gate was frozen (Jul 10 11:55 -> Jul 13 03:35 UTC, data unseen by any prior analysis), the contrarian fade edge was ABSENT: ungated wr 0.456 (n=79, EV -7.18c), live-gated (eff6>=0.10 & cnt12<=6) wr 0.467 (n=60, EV -6.08c, CI [-17.0,+7.3]).
headline_findings.corroboration: Live paper ledger same window: impulse50 wr .412 (n=34, -7.8c/share net), reversal_v2 wr .419 (n=43, -7.2c/share), measurement book wr .429 (n=35) -- all below breakeven .4898 at their .473 avg entries. Jul 10 was the worst single day in the 63-day series (ungated -13.97c, n=49); Jul 11-13 alone: wr .519, EV -0.90c (n=54).
headline_findings.interpretation: Cannot claim the edge is dead (CI wide), but the pooled TEST level (+3.2 to +4.6c) is entirely pre-Jul-10; nothing in the post-freeze window is currently paying fees.

headline_findings.claim: The fade edge is strongly episodic at weekly scale: weekly ungated EV swings from +6.3c (W20) to -3.6c (W23) to +5.4c (W27) to -2.8c (W29). 5 of 10 weeks are fee-negative. Any deployment must budget for multi-week droughts; a fixed 7d guard window will whipsaw.

Reversal rate rises monotonically with prior-|move| size on TEST: 12-20bps wr .5468 (EV +1.93c, n=662), >=20bps wr .5800 (EV +5.26c, n=431, block-boot CI [+1.15,+9.69], p_le_0=0.0047). But TRAIN >=20bps is .5208 (EV -0.67c, n=1300) -- fails fees. Best-of-6 buckets (K=6): corrected p ~ 0.028. Confirms prior round's decision to keep rev20 as diagnostic only; the TEST strength is period-driven, same pattern as the gate level.

The 5m resolution series is genuinely anti-persistent: runs test z=+2.22 (p=.026) TRAIN, z=+4.16 (p=3e-5) TEST; lag-1 sign autocorr -0.0195 [-0.036,-0.003] TRAIN, -0.0593 [-0.086,-0.033] TEST. No other lag 2-12 is stable across splits (K=24). But unconditional lag-1 reversal is only 50.6-52.6% -- far below the 52.75% fee hurdle at 51c. Structure exists; only the conditioned (large-move) form has ever cleared fees.

On the May11-Jun25 TRAIN window the live gate's increment over excluded triggers is +5.56c [1.75,9.24] p=0.0018 (n 2015 vs 993); on TEST it is +4.69c [-1.39,10.98] p=0.0625 (n 787 vs 306). Directionally stable, still short of the p<0.01 bar on TEST. The FRESH-window increment for the TRAIN-calibrated A=0.32 gate is +23.2c p=0.021 but n=45 and one of 3 gate arms (K=3) -- suggestive only. The day-60 paired shadow verdict remains the deciding experiment; nothing here overturns it.

Weekends are structurally quieter: median |5m move| drops ~45% (6.5->3.9bps TRAIN, 7.2->3.6bps TEST) and trigger rate halves (.26->.13 TRAIN, .28->.11 TEST) -- robust in both splits. Weekend fade EV is directionally BETTER in both splits (+0.27 vs -0.74c TRAIN; +7.25 [0.41,14.29] vs +2.40c TEST) and in the live v3 ledger (weekend +0.63c/share wr .50 n=46 vs weekday -8.99c wr .37 n=57), but the weekend-minus-weekday increment is not significant (p=.33 TRAIN, p=.12 TEST). Do NOT stand down on weekends; expect ~55% fewer gated signals/day.

dead_ends: Vol terciles (trailing-1h sum|r|, TRAIN-fit cutoffs) as a fade filter: tercile ordering flips TRAIN->TEST (TRAIN best=mid +2.58c, worst=low -5.66c; TEST low +4.01c, mid +5.26c, hi +1.95c); hi-vs-rest contrast negative both splits but CI spans 0 (-2.33c p=.88 TRAIN, -3.10c p=.85 TEST). Confirms prior round's DEAD verdict on vol level with fresh data.
latentfire eff12<=0.48 gate re-tested on 63d: increment -0.48c TRAIN / +0.09c TEST vs excluded -- adds nothing over ungated. Retirement stands.
Funding sign-flip (24h window, Deribit hourly, extended to Jul 13 via fresh GET): TRAIN -0.47c p=.61, TEST +4.46c p=.099 -- sign flip across splits, dead as a filter.
Funding |rate|>=TRAIN-p90: TRAIN says extreme funding HURTS the fade (-5.40c [-10.3,-0.5]) but TEST shows -0.66c [-6.4,+4.9] -- magnitude does not replicate; not deployable either direction.
OI 1h-change extremes (binance.vision, Jun10-Jul10 only): -3.82c TRAIN / -0.22c TEST, both CI span 0. Dead.
Premium-index sign flips/sign: untestable -- premium was negative ~99% of the era (TEST flip n=15); insufficient variation.
Sign autocorrelation lags 2-12: no lag stable across TRAIN/TEST (K=24); lag-1 is the only real structure and it is fee-dead unconditioned.
data_notes: Fresh Deribit funding (public GET, 87 hourly rows Jul 9 15:00 -> Jul 13 03:00) merged at runtime from scratchpad/funding_fresh.json; binance fapi remains georestricted; OI/premium end Jul 9-10 as harvested.
